releaseNotes: v0.25.1 — structural fixes that prevent classes of bug rather than specific bugs. Android instrumentation testing now runs on every push + PR via a real emulator in GitHub Actions (would have caught the v0.24.22 WAL pragma incident pre-deploy). Three-layer op-type drift gate at commit time: a single-source-of-truth Dart set is asserted equal to KNOWN_OP_TYPES in sync-append AND the DB CHECK constraint via regex scrape (would have caught the v0.24.19 incident before push). Corrupt-op dead-letter table replaces the silent-delete behavior in drainOutbound — failed-to-parse rows are preserved with their JSON + error for support, surfaced as a red count on Sync Diagnostics. dbVersion 17. 407 tests passing.
